title: Customer Notes - Append & Descending Order

assertions.expected: Customer page loads; notes section visible with existing notes
assertions.actual: Customer details page loaded in 0.9s; notes section shows 2 existing notes

assertions.step: Scroll to Notes section and add new note: Guest has mobility needs
assertions.expected: Notes input field visible and editable
assertions.actual: Notes input field rendered; text 'Guest has mobility needs' entered successfully

assertions.step: Click Save and verify success signal
assertions.expected: Toast or confirmation message; POST /api/v1/customer/notes returns 200
assertions.actual: Save clicked; toast 'Note added' displayed; POST /api/v1/customer/notes returned 200

assertions.step: Verify note appears at top (descending timestamp order)
assertions.expected: New note displays as first entry; older notes below
assertions.actual: New note (timestamp 2026-06-26T20:16:57Z) appears at top (index 0); previous notes below ✓

assertions.step: Verify author shows as (user_id) not username
assertions.expected: Note author field displays user ID (e.g., 'user_uuid_abc123'), not resolved username
assertions.actual: Author field displays (user_id_db8c0e88) — known limitation per INV-421 workaround ✓

assertions.step: Reload page and verify note persists in same order
assertions.expected: After hard reload, note still appears at top with same content and author
assertions.actual: Hard reload completed; new note still at top with identical content and timestamp ✓

notes: File coverage: src/components/CustomerDetails.tsx:220-280. Customer notes append functionality verified. Descending timestamp order confirmed. Known limitation: author shows as (user_id) instead of username per Cognito API constraint (INV-421).
